stdout:
▶ alert trigger replay
  ✔ records triggered and missed scheduled history without firing disabled or archived rules (6.485917ms)
  ✔ does not duplicate triggered history for an already triggered rule (0.166334ms)
✔ alert trigger replay (7.226875ms)
✔ gate fixture checksum matches the frozen corpus sidecar (6.341917ms)
✔ fixture corpus maps AC-01 through AC-05 to replayable surfaces (1.247042ms)
✔ source fixtures cover formal, degraded, stale, unavailable and insufficient paths without live URLs (0.231666ms)
✔ fixture envelope generation is deterministic for replay (1.610708ms)
✔ alert, archive and workspace fixtures retain negative-path state (0.0735ms)
✔ MTS replay corpus stays deterministic and covers valid, insufficient and degraded states (2.824666ms)
✔ registry mutation replay proves removed entries degrade instead of passing silently (3.108042ms)
✔ workspace migration replay corpus covers legacy, corrupt and per-symbol layout recovery (2.220459ms)
▶ alert rule model
  ✔ creates typed price, change, technical, MTS and scheduled rules (0.708083ms)
  ✔ rejects invalid taxonomy and scheduled condition gaps (0.19625ms)
  ✔ keeps activation and trigger state separate through archive, restore and ack (0.182375ms)
✔ alert rule model (1.608459ms)
✔ MtsReasonRegistry is keyed by stable reason code and has no free-text code drift (0.815292ms)
✔ unknown registry codes degrade to UNKNOWN_CODE instead of becoming free text (0.1135ms)
▶ MTS explanation
  ✔ returns a structured technical alert without investment advice language (4.1135ms)
  ✔ does not output a valid alert level when data is insufficient (0.558791ms)
  ✔ invalidates MTS when source health is degraded (1.776792ms)
✔ MTS explanation (7.435667ms)
▶ market data source
  ✔ returns formal Yahoo data on success (2.100833ms)
  ✔ falls back to demo data when Yahoo payload cannot be parsed (0.865708ms)
  ✔ serves stale cached data when the upstream fails after TTL expiry (0.735375ms)
  ✔ returns unavailable when the network fails without usable cache (1.006375ms)
  ✔ hits the in-memory cache within the 60 second TTL (0.157459ms)
  ✔ bypasses cache when forceRefresh is set (0.201208ms)
  ✔ uses the provider and range in the cache key (0.446291ms)
✔ market data source (6.967208ms)
▶ watchlist archive and restore state
  ✔ archives a symbol without physically deleting it (0.682666ms)
  ✔ suspends enabled alerts when a symbol is archived (0.083875ms)
  ✔ restores archived symbols and alert activation intent together (0.107416ms)
  ✔ keeps disabled intent disabled after restore (0.0415ms)
✔ watchlist archive and restore state (1.525625ms)
▶ watchlist normalization preview
  ✔ blocks ambiguous numeric input while US is selected (1.336833ms)
  ✔ normalizes HK input before adding it to active watchlist (0.261917ms)
  ✔ normalizes mainland China symbols with exchange suffixes (0.087834ms)
  ✔ normalizes Korean numeric symbols with KS suffix (0.423625ms)
  ✔ blocks numeric symbols that do not match the selected market (0.050375ms)
  ✔ does not allow duplicate active symbols (0.076208ms)
  ✔ marks archived symbols as restorable (0.041958ms)
✔ watchlist normalization preview (2.9155ms)
▶ watchlist localStorage replay
  ✔ replays archived symbols and suspended alert restore intent from localStorage (0.701541ms)
  ✔ migrates legacy watchlist and alert records to explicit active/enabled state (0.292208ms)
  ✔ keeps legacy disabled alerts disabled during replay (0.520125ms)
✔ watchlist localStorage replay (2.41375ms)
✔ legacy watchlist and alerts keys migrate into WorkspaceSnapshotV2 without losing alert history (1.376917ms)
✔ corrupt workspace snapshot falls back to a usable focus layout (0.287333ms)
✔ per-symbol layouts are normalized by symbol and stay independent from global fallback (0.1795ms)
✔ large workspace snapshot remains under storage gate and preserves alert history (1.566666ms)
ℹ tests 43
ℹ suites 7
ℹ pass 43
ℹ fail 0
ℹ cancelled 0
ℹ skipped 0
ℹ todo 0
